metadata.description: A curated collection of Codex CLI plugins by Joe Black

plugins.name: mcp-exec
plugins.description: Sandboxed code execution MCP server — keep intermediate results out of the context window.

plugins.name: memtree
plugins.description: Persistent graph store for codebase and web navigation. Symbol-chunks files, stores nodes in a SQLite graph, and returns compact references. Enables recall across sessions without re-reading files via memtree_search, memtree_neighbors, and memtree_compose.
